faqs.question: How much does fly control cost in Belleville, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our fly control services in Belleville range from $350 to $550 depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and type of flies present. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees before beginning any treatment.

faqs.answer: We handle all common fly species in Belleville including house flies, fruit flies, drain flies, blow flies, and cluster flies.
